description:
Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Key Features:
- Launch applications, files, folders, websites, web services (with parameters) and prompts in milliseconds.
- Trigger multiple actions with one text command and/or hotkey.
- Let's be an expert in opening up the world instead of trying to put the whole world inside of Executor (as some alternatives try to do).
- Take the clipboard to a new level, swiftly trigger system commands, do fast calculations, manage running applications and more.
- Tailor keywords, appearance, hotkeys, and behavior to perfectly match your daily workflow.
- Customize the look and feel with various skins and theming options to match your desktop setup.
What's new
- Added "Auto-detect calculations" so no need to first type # before calculations. Enabled by default. It can be toggled on/off in "Settings" -> "Misc" in case it interferes with your workflow. The setting to add calculations to history will still prefix any calculation in history with # for grouping them. In case a keyword, filesystem, indexed-item, URL etc. actually is a valid calculation, these will precede the auto-detection of calculations.
Improvements
- $TEXTREGEX$,$TEXTREGEXPASTE$ now supports running more than one RegEx. See documentation here.
- Improved functionality that "types" text in other windows by pasting the text. It's now less error prone.
- A warning will be displayed if you on a fresh install start out by using the portable 32-bit version on a 64-bit Windows.
- Added some more (non-personal) info to the -report function for bug reporting in order to better debug problems.
